calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Edward W. Suman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff IJC Food Products Corporation, dba K&K Seafood and Meat.
Iris Tam, the owner of IJC Food Products Corporation, dba K&K Seafood and Meat, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Yu Ling Chao or Pier 6 Chinese Cuisine.
Default was entered against defendants on October 20, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 20, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff IJC Food Products Corporation, dba K&K Seafood and Meat, and against the Defaulted Defendants Yu Ling Chao and Pier 6 Chinese Cuisine as follows:

Damages/Principal - $51,240.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $18,825.24.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $1,098.60, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,163.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
